title: Use EVM scratch space (0x00-0x3f) for slot derivation
description: EVM reserves 0x00-0x3f as scratch space — safe to use without updating the free memory pointer at 0x40. Writing slot inputs here avoids memory expansion gas entirely.
pattern_before:
// Standard — allocates new memory
bytes32 slot = keccak256(abi.encode(owner, BALANCE_SLOT));
when_to_apply: Any mapping slot computation where inputs fit in 64 bytes
when_not_to_apply: Nested mappings requiring more than 64 bytes of input, when scratch space is already in use by outer assembly block
